reviews.review_msg: Jane had long, boring lectures. Tough, rigorous marking. Looks for very specific work, attention to detail is an absolute MUST in her class. Lots of group work. People don't usually do well in 217, but I did my best to stand out and put in lots of effort and it paid off for me in Jane's class. Be prepared to go the extra mile to be above the curve.

Jane loves group work. Course was divided into 4 main assignments (15% each) and lots of little quizzes and activities worth less than 10% each. Very long, boring lectures but content was very simple. Class avg was low on every assignment, but gave good feedback for how to improve. Just pay close attention to detail + get all the easy marks.
